name: open-dashboard
description: Open Dashboard — 40+ copy-ready admin UI shape skills (CRUD, detail, master-detail, kanban, calendar, wizard, billing, RBAC, i18n, …) plus rebrand / scaffold / port operations. The shape skills compose on top of the scaffold-dashboard foundation (a TanStack Start back-office substrate).

plugins.name: open-dashboard
plugins.description: The full Open Dashboard skill catalogue — every UI-shape skill (CRUD, detail, master-detail, kanban, calendar, wizard, billing, RBAC, i18n, …) plus the rebrand / scaffold / strip / trim / backend-preset operations. The shape skills assume the scaffold-dashboard base (TanStack Start + the platform layer) — run scaffold-dashboard or fork the repo first, then compose the shapes on top.
